questions.question: What directory organization strategy is recommended for scaling Vue apps across multiple teams?
options: Group all components together, all stores together, all composables together
Organize by business domain with feature modules, each owning its vertical slice
Use a single global store with namespaced modules per team
Separate frontend and backend code into different repos per team

questions.question: What is the purpose of each feature's index.ts barrel export file?
options: To auto-generate TypeScript types for external consumers
To define the feature's public API: what other features are allowed to import
To register the feature's components globally with Vue
To configure the feature's Pinia store with initial state

questions.question: Which tool is mentioned for enforcing module boundaries between features?
